title: bidens pilosa subvar. discoidea
intro: Bidens pilosa subvar. discoidea, also known as the blackseed or hairy beggarticks, is a subspecies of the Bidens pilosa plant, a type of flowering plant in the aster family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens pilosa subvar. discoidea include reducing fever and inflammation, relieving pain and discomfort, and supporting the immune system. Bidens pilosa subvar. discoidea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
